name: Quota and filesystem fixture evidence
summary: Use public-safe storage snippets to check quota, inode, and capacity triage signals.

fixtures.description: Synthetic df output showing high byte and inode utilization.
Synthetic application log with quota and ENOSPC signals.

checks.label: Filesystem fixture contains byte and inode pressure
Log fixture contains common storage failures

expected_outcomes: The skill should distinguish filesystem fullness, quota, inode exhaustion, and path permission evidence.
The skill should ask for redacted path and log context before suggesting site-specific remediation.
